era_context: Early Bronze Age III; Old Kingdom Egypt (Dynasty IV); Early Dynastic III Mesopotamia. Established state systems in river valleys; monumental architecture and writing systems in place. Most of the world is preliterate.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No specific events are attested for this year.
historiographic_note: 3064 BCE is not documented in any surviving contemporary source. The year falls within the Old Kingdom of Egypt and Early Dynastic III Mesopotamia, but no specific events are recorded. Year-by-year historical reconstruction is not possible for this period.
